      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      EmailControllerApi.APIapplyImapFlagOperationRequest applyImapFlagOperation(UUID emailId, ImapFlagOperationOptions imapFlagOperationOptions)
      Set IMAP flags associated with a message.
      EmailControllerApi.APIcanSendRequest canSend(UUID inboxId, SendEmailOptions sendEmailOptions)
      Check whether an email send would be accepted Validates sender/inbox context and recipient eligibility before attempting a send.
      EmailControllerApi.APIcheckEmailBodyRequest checkEmailBody(UUID emailId)
      Check email body for broken links, images, and spelling issues Runs content quality checks against hydrated email body content.
      EmailControllerApi.APIcheckEmailBodyFeatureSupportRequest checkEmailBodyFeatureSupport(UUID emailId)
      Check client support for features used in a stored email body Detects HTML/CSS features in the target email body and reports compatibility across major email clients and devices.
      EmailControllerApi.APIcheckEmailClientSupportRequest checkEmailClientSupport(CheckEmailClientSupportOptions checkEmailClientSupportOptions)
      Check email-client support for a provided HTML body Evaluates HTML/CSS features in the supplied body and reports support coverage across major email clients and platforms.
      EmailControllerApi.APIdeleteAllEmailsRequest deleteAllEmails()
      Delete all emails in all inboxes.
      EmailControllerApi.APIdeleteEmailRequest deleteEmail(UUID emailId)
      Delete an email Deletes a single email from account scope.
      EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadAttachmentRequest downloadAttachment(UUID emailId, String attachmentId)
      Get email attachment bytes.
      EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadAttachmentBase64Request downloadAttachmentBase64(UUID emailId, String attachmentId)
      Get email attachment as base64 encoded string as an alternative to binary responses.
      EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadBodyRequest downloadBody(UUID emailId)
      Get email body as string.
      EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadBodyBytesRequest downloadBodyBytes(UUID emailId)
      Get email body in bytes.
      EmailControllerApi.APIforwardEmailRequest forwardEmail(UUID emailId, ForwardEmailOptions forwardEmailOptions)
      Forward email to recipients Forwards an existing email to new recipients.
      ApiClient getApiClient() 
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetAttachmentMetaDataRequest getAttachmentMetaData(UUID emailId, String attachmentId)
      Get email attachment metadata.
      String getCustomBaseUrl() 
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailRequest getEmail(UUID emailId)
      Get hydrated email (headers and body) Returns parsed email content including headers and body fields.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailAttachmentsRequest getEmailAttachments(UUID emailId)
      List attachment metadata for an email Returns metadata for all attachment IDs associated with the email (name, content type, size, and IDs).
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailCodesRequest getEmailCodes(UUID emailId)
      Extract verification codes from an email Extracts one-time passcodes and similar tokens from email content.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailContentMatchRequest getEmailContentMatch(UUID emailId, ContentMatchOptions contentMatchOptions)
      Run regex against hydrated email body and return matches Executes a Java regex pattern over hydrated email body text and returns the full match plus capture groups.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailContentPartRequest getEmailContentPart(UUID emailId, String contentType)
      Get email content part by content type Extracts one MIME body part by `contentType` and optional `index`, returned in a structured DTO with metadata.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailContentPartContentRequest getEmailContentPartContent(UUID emailId, String contentType)
      Get multipart content part as raw response Extracts one MIME body part by `contentType` and optional `index`, and returns raw content with matching response content type when valid.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailCountRequest getEmailCount()
      Get email count Returns total email count for the authenticated user, or count scoped to a specific inbox when `inboxId` is provided.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailHTMLRequest getEmailHTML(UUID emailId)
      Get hydrated email HTML for browser rendering Returns hydrated HTML body directly with `text/html` content type.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailHTMLJsonRequest getEmailHTMLJson(UUID emailId)
      Get hydrated email HTML wrapped in JSON Returns hydrated HTML body and subject in a JSON DTO.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailHTMLQueryRequest getEmailHTMLQuery(UUID emailId, String htmlSelector)
      Query hydrated HTML body and return matching text lines Applies a JSoup/CSS selector to hydrated HTML email body and returns matching text lines.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailLinksRequest getEmailLinks(UUID emailId)
      Extract links from an email HTML body Parses HTML content and extracts link URLs (`href`).
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailPreviewURLsRequest getEmailPreviewURLs(UUID emailId)
      Get email URLs for viewing in browser or downloading Returns precomputed URLs for preview and raw message access for the specified email.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailScreenshotAsBase64Request getEmailScreenshotAsBase64(UUID emailId, GetEmailScreenshotOptions getEmailScreenshotOptions)
      Take a screenshot of an email in a browser and return base64 encoded string Renders the email in a browser engine and returns PNG data as base64.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailScreenshotAsBinaryRequest getEmailScreenshotAsBinary(UUID emailId, GetEmailScreenshotOptions getEmailScreenshotOptions)
      Take a screenshot of an email in a browser Renders the email in a browser engine and returns PNG bytes.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailSignatureRequest getEmailSignature(UUID emailId)
      Extract signature from an inbound email Attempts to parse a sender signature block from an email body.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailsOffsetPaginatedRequest getEmailsOffsetPaginated()
      Get all emails in all inboxes in paginated form.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailsPaginatedRequest getEmailsPaginated()
      Get all emails in all inboxes in paginated form.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailSummaryRequest getEmailSummary(UUID emailId)
      Get email summary (headers/metadata only) Returns lightweight metadata and headers for an email.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailTextLinesRequest getEmailTextLines(UUID emailId)
      Extract normalized text lines from email body Converts email body content to line-based plain text with optional HTML entity decoding and custom line separator.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailThreadRequest getEmailThread(UUID threadId)
      Get email thread metadata by thread ID Returns thread metadata built from RFC 5322 `Message-ID`, `In-Reply-To`, and `References` headers.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailThreadItemsRequest getEmailThreadItems(UUID threadId)
      Get messages in a specific email thread Returns all messages in a thread ordered by `createdAt` using the requested sort direction.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailThreadsRequest getEmailThreads()
      List email threads in paginated form Lists conversation threads inferred from `Message-ID`, `In-Reply-To`, and `References`.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetGravatarUrlForEmailAddressRequest getGravatarUrlForEmailAddress(String emailAddress)
      Get Gravatar URL for an email address Builds a Gravatar image URL from the provided email address and optional size.
      int getHostIndex() 
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetLatestEmailRequest getLatestEmail()
      Get latest email in all inboxes.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetLatestEmailInInbox1Request getLatestEmailInInbox1(UUID inboxId)
      Get latest email in an inbox.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetOrganizationEmailsPaginatedRequest getOrganizationEmailsPaginated()
      List organization-visible emails Returns paginated emails visible through organization/team access.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetRawEmailContentsRequest getRawEmailContents(UUID emailId)
      Get raw email string.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetRawEmailJsonRequest getRawEmailJson(UUID emailId)
      Get raw email in JSON.
      EmailControllerApi.APIgetUnreadEmailCountRequest getUnreadEmailCount()
      Get unread email count Returns unread email count.
      EmailControllerApi.APImarkAllAsReadRequest markAllAsRead()
      Mark all emails as read or unread Sets read state for all emails, optionally scoped to one inbox.
      EmailControllerApi.APImarkAsReadRequest markAsRead(UUID emailId)
      Mark an email as read or unread Sets read state for one email.
      EmailControllerApi.APIreplyToEmailRequest replyToEmail(UUID emailId, ReplyToEmailOptions replyToEmailOptions)
      Reply to an email Sends a reply using the original conversation context (subject/thread headers).
      EmailControllerApi.APIsearchEmailsRequest searchEmails(SearchEmailsOptions searchEmailsOptions)
      Get all emails by search criteria.
      EmailControllerApi.APIsendEmailSourceOptionalRequest sendEmailSourceOptional(SendEmailOptions sendEmailOptions)
      Send email Sends an email from an existing inbox, or creates a temporary inbox when `inboxId` is not provided.
      void setApiClient(ApiClient apiClient) 
      void setCustomBaseUrl(String customBaseUrl) 
      EmailControllerApi.APIsetEmailFavouritedRequest setEmailFavourited(UUID emailId, Boolean favourited)
      Set email favourited state Sets favourite state for an email for dashboard/search workflows.
      void setHostIndex(int hostIndex) 
      EmailControllerApi.APIvalidateEmailRequest validateEmail(UUID emailId)
      Validate email HTML contents Runs HTML validation on the email body when HTML is present.

      • applyImapFlagOperation

        public EmailControllerApi.APIapplyImapFlagOperationRequest applyImapFlagOperation(@Nonnull
                                                                                  UUID emailId,
                                                                                  @Nonnull
                                                                                  ImapFlagOperationOptions imapFlagOperationOptions)
        Set IMAP flags associated with a message. Only supports '\\Seen' flag. Applies RFC3501 IMAP flag operations on a message. Current implementation supports read/unread semantics via the `\\\\Seen` flag only.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        imapFlagOperationOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIapplyImapFlagOperationRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • canSend

        public EmailControllerApi.APIcanSendRequest canSend(@Nonnull
                                                    UUID inboxId,
                                                    @Nonnull
                                                    SendEmailOptions sendEmailOptions)
        Check whether an email send would be accepted Validates sender/inbox context and recipient eligibility before attempting a send. Useful for preflight checks in UI or test workflows.
        Parameters:
        inboxId - ID of the inbox you want to send the email from (required)
        sendEmailOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIcanSendRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • checkEmailBody

        public EmailControllerApi.APIcheckEmailBodyRequest checkEmailBody(@Nonnull
                                                                  UUID emailId)
        Check email body for broken links, images, and spelling issues Runs content quality checks against hydrated email body content. This endpoint performs outbound HTTP checks for linked resources, so avoid use with sensitive or stateful URLs.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIcheckEmailBodyRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • checkEmailBodyFeatureSupport

        public EmailControllerApi.APIcheckEmailBodyFeatureSupportRequest checkEmailBodyFeatureSupport(@Nonnull
                                                                                              UUID emailId)
        Check client support for features used in a stored email body Detects HTML/CSS features in the target email body and reports compatibility across major email clients and devices.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIcheckEmailBodyFeatureSupportRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • checkEmailClientSupport

        public EmailControllerApi.APIcheckEmailClientSupportRequest checkEmailClientSupport(@Nonnull
                                                                                    CheckEmailClientSupportOptions checkEmailClientSupportOptions)
        Check email-client support for a provided HTML body Evaluates HTML/CSS features in the supplied body and reports support coverage across major email clients and platforms.
        Parameters:
        checkEmailClientSupportOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIcheckEmailClientSupportRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • deleteAllEmails

        public EmailControllerApi.APIdeleteAllEmailsRequest deleteAllEmails()
        Delete all emails in all inboxes. Deletes all emails for the authenticated account context. This operation is destructive and cannot be undone.
        Returns:
        APIdeleteAllEmailsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        204 No Content -

      • deleteEmail

        public EmailControllerApi.APIdeleteEmailRequest deleteEmail(@Nonnull
                                                            UUID emailId)
        Delete an email Deletes a single email from account scope. Operation is destructive and not reversible.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to delete (required)
        Returns:
        APIdeleteEmailRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        204 No Content -

      • downloadAttachment

        public EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadAttachmentRequest downloadAttachment(@Nonnull
                                                                          UUID emailId,
                                                                          @Nonnull
                                                                          String attachmentId)
        Get email attachment bytes. Returned as `octet-stream` with content type header. If you have trouble with byte responses try the `downloadAttachmentBase64` response endpoints and convert the base 64 encoded content to a file or string. Returns attachment bytes by attachment ID. Use attachment IDs from email payloads or attachment listing endpoints.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        attachmentId - ID of attachment (required)
        Returns:
        APIdownloadAttachmentRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        0 default response -

      • downloadAttachmentBase64

        public EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadAttachmentBase64Request downloadAttachmentBase64(@Nonnull
                                                                                      UUID emailId,
                                                                                      @Nonnull
                                                                                      String attachmentId)
        Get email attachment as base64 encoded string as an alternative to binary responses. Decode the `base64FileContents` as a `utf-8` encoded string or array of bytes depending on the `contentType`. Returns attachment payload as base64 in JSON. Useful for clients that cannot reliably consume binary streaming responses.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        attachmentId - ID of attachment (required)
        Returns:
        APIdownloadAttachmentBase64Request
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • downloadBody

        public EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadBodyRequest downloadBody(@Nonnull
                                                              UUID emailId)
        Get email body as string. Returned as `plain/text` with content type header. Returns hydrated email body text as a string with content type aligned to the underlying body format.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        Returns:
        APIdownloadBodyRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • downloadBodyBytes

        public EmailControllerApi.APIdownloadBodyBytesRequest downloadBodyBytes(@Nonnull
                                                                        UUID emailId)
        Get email body in bytes. Returned as `octet-stream` with content type header. Streams hydrated email body bytes with content type derived from the message body format.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        Returns:
        APIdownloadBodyBytesRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        0 default response -

      • forwardEmail

        public EmailControllerApi.APIforwardEmailRequest forwardEmail(@Nonnull
                                                              UUID emailId,
                                                              @Nonnull
                                                              ForwardEmailOptions forwardEmailOptions)
        Forward email to recipients Forwards an existing email to new recipients. Uses the owning inbox context unless overridden by allowed sender options.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        forwardEmailOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIforwardEmailRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        201 Created -

      • getAttachmentMetaData

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetAttachmentMetaDataRequest getAttachmentMetaData(@Nonnull
                                                                                UUID emailId,
                                                                                @Nonnull
                                                                                String attachmentId)
        Get email attachment metadata. This is the `contentType` and `contentLength` of an attachment. To get the individual attachments use the `downloadAttachment` methods. Returns metadata for a specific attachment ID (name, content type, and size fields).
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        attachmentId - ID of attachment (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetAttachmentMetaDataRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmail

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailRequest getEmail(@Nonnull
                                                      UUID emailId)
        Get hydrated email (headers and body) Returns parsed email content including headers and body fields. Accessing hydrated content may mark the email as read depending on read-state rules.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailAttachments

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailAttachmentsRequest getEmailAttachments(@Nonnull
                                                                            UUID emailId)
        List attachment metadata for an email Returns metadata for all attachment IDs associated with the email (name, content type, size, and IDs).
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailAttachmentsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailCodes

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailCodesRequest getEmailCodes(@Nonnull
                                                                UUID emailId)
        Extract verification codes from an email Extracts one-time passcodes and similar tokens from email content. Supports deterministic extraction now with method/fallback flags (`AUTO`, `PATTERN`, `LLM`, `OCR`, `OCR_THEN_LLM`) for QA and future advanced pipelines.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to extract codes from (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailCodesRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailContentMatch

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailContentMatchRequest getEmailContentMatch(@Nonnull
                                                                              UUID emailId,
                                                                              @Nonnull
                                                                              ContentMatchOptions contentMatchOptions)
        Run regex against hydrated email body and return matches Executes a Java regex pattern over hydrated email body text and returns the full match plus capture groups. Pattern syntax follows Java `Pattern` rules.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to match against (required)
        contentMatchOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailContentMatchRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailContentPart

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailContentPartRequest getEmailContentPart(@Nonnull
                                                                            UUID emailId,
                                                                            @Nonnull
                                                                            String contentType)
        Get email content part by content type Extracts one MIME body part by `contentType` and optional `index`, returned in a structured DTO with metadata.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to match against (required)
        contentType - Content type (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailContentPartRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailContentPartContent

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailContentPartContentRequest getEmailContentPartContent(@Nonnull
                                                                                          UUID emailId,
                                                                                          @Nonnull
                                                                                          String contentType)
        Get multipart content part as raw response Extracts one MIME body part by `contentType` and optional `index`, and returns raw content with matching response content type when valid.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to match against (required)
        contentType - Content type (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailContentPartContentRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailCount

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailCountRequest getEmailCount()
        Get email count Returns total email count for the authenticated user, or count scoped to a specific inbox when `inboxId` is provided.
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailCountRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailHTML

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailHTMLRequest getEmailHTML(@Nonnull
                                                              UUID emailId)
        Get hydrated email HTML for browser rendering Returns hydrated HTML body directly with `text/html` content type. Supports temporary access/browser usage and optional CID replacement for inline asset rendering.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailHTMLRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailHTMLJson

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailHTMLJsonRequest getEmailHTMLJson(@Nonnull
                                                                      UUID emailId)
        Get hydrated email HTML wrapped in JSON Returns hydrated HTML body and subject in a JSON DTO. Useful for API clients that need structured response payloads instead of raw HTML responses.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailHTMLJsonRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailHTMLQuery

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailHTMLQueryRequest getEmailHTMLQuery(@Nonnull
                                                                        UUID emailId,
                                                                        @Nonnull
                                                                        String htmlSelector)
        Query hydrated HTML body and return matching text lines Applies a JSoup/CSS selector to hydrated HTML email body and returns matching text lines.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to perform HTML query on (required)
        htmlSelector - HTML selector to search for. Uses JQuery/JSoup/CSS style selector like '.my-div' to match content. See https://jsoup.org/apidocs/org/jsoup/select/Selector.html for more information. (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailHTMLQueryRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailLinks

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailLinksRequest getEmailLinks(@Nonnull
                                                                UUID emailId)
        Extract links from an email HTML body Parses HTML content and extracts link URLs (`href`). For non-HTML emails this endpoint returns a validation error.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to fetch text for (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailLinksRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailPreviewURLs

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailPreviewURLsRequest getEmailPreviewURLs(@Nonnull
                                                                            UUID emailId)
        Get email URLs for viewing in browser or downloading Returns precomputed URLs for preview and raw message access for the specified email.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailPreviewURLsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailScreenshotAsBase64

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailScreenshotAsBase64Request getEmailScreenshotAsBase64(@Nonnull
                                                                                          UUID emailId,
                                                                                          @Nonnull
                                                                                          GetEmailScreenshotOptions getEmailScreenshotOptions)
        Take a screenshot of an email in a browser and return base64 encoded string Renders the email in a browser engine and returns PNG data as base64. Useful for APIs and dashboards that cannot easily stream binary responses.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        getEmailScreenshotOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailScreenshotAsBase64Request
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailScreenshotAsBinary

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailScreenshotAsBinaryRequest getEmailScreenshotAsBinary(@Nonnull
                                                                                          UUID emailId,
                                                                                          @Nonnull
                                                                                          GetEmailScreenshotOptions getEmailScreenshotOptions)
        Take a screenshot of an email in a browser Renders the email in a browser engine and returns PNG bytes. Intended for visual QA and rendering regression checks.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        getEmailScreenshotOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailScreenshotAsBinaryRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailSignature

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailSignatureRequest getEmailSignature(@Nonnull
                                                                        UUID emailId)
        Extract signature from an inbound email Attempts to parse a sender signature block from an email body. Uses raw MIME content parts when possible and falls back to hydrated body parsing. This is heuristic and may not be accurate for all email clients or formats.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to extract signature from (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailSignatureRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailSummary

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailSummaryRequest getEmailSummary(@Nonnull
                                                                    UUID emailId)
        Get email summary (headers/metadata only) Returns lightweight metadata and headers for an email. Use `getEmail` for hydrated body content or `getRawEmail` for original SMTP content.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailSummaryRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailTextLines

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailTextLinesRequest getEmailTextLines(@Nonnull
                                                                        UUID emailId)
        Extract normalized text lines from email body Converts email body content to line-based plain text with optional HTML entity decoding and custom line separator.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to fetch text for (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailTextLinesRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailThread

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailThreadRequest getEmailThread(@Nonnull
                                                                  UUID threadId)
        Get email thread metadata by thread ID Returns thread metadata built from RFC 5322 `Message-ID`, `In-Reply-To`, and `References` headers. Use `getEmailThreadItems` to fetch the thread messages.
        Parameters:
        threadId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailThreadRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailThreadItems

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailThreadItemsRequest getEmailThreadItems(@Nonnull
                                                                            UUID threadId)
        Get messages in a specific email thread Returns all messages in a thread ordered by `createdAt` using the requested sort direction.
        Parameters:
        threadId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailThreadItemsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailThreads

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailThreadsRequest getEmailThreads()
        List email threads in paginated form Lists conversation threads inferred from `Message-ID`, `In-Reply-To`, and `References`. Supports filtering by inbox, search text, and time range.
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailThreadsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailsOffsetPaginated

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailsOffsetPaginatedRequest getEmailsOffsetPaginated()
        Get all emails in all inboxes in paginated form. Email API list all. Offset-style pagination endpoint for listing emails across inboxes. Supports inbox filters, unread-only, search, date boundaries, favourites, connector sync, plus-address filtering, and explicit include IDs.
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailsOffsetPaginatedRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getEmailsPaginated

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetEmailsPaginatedRequest getEmailsPaginated()
        Get all emails in all inboxes in paginated form. Email API list all. Primary paginated email listing endpoint. Returns emails across inboxes with support for inbox filters, unread-only, search, date boundaries, favourites, connector sync, and plus-address filtering.
        Returns:
        APIgetEmailsPaginatedRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getGravatarUrlForEmailAddress

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetGravatarUrlForEmailAddressRequest getGravatarUrlForEmailAddress(@Nonnull
                                                                                                String emailAddress)
        Get Gravatar URL for an email address Builds a Gravatar image URL from the provided email address and optional size. This endpoint does not fetch image bytes; it only returns the computed URL.
        Parameters:
        emailAddress - (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetGravatarUrlForEmailAddressRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getLatestEmail

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetLatestEmailRequest getLatestEmail()
        Get latest email in all inboxes. Most recently received. Returns the most recently received email across all inboxes or an optional subset of inbox IDs.
        Returns:
        APIgetLatestEmailRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getLatestEmailInInbox1

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetLatestEmailInInbox1Request getLatestEmailInInbox1(@Nonnull
                                                                                  UUID inboxId)
        Get latest email in an inbox. Use `WaitForController` to get emails that may not have arrived yet. Returns the newest email for the specified inbox ID. For polling/wait semantics use wait endpoints.
        Parameters:
        inboxId - ID of the inbox you want to get the latest email from (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetLatestEmailInInbox1Request
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getOrganizationEmailsPaginated

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetOrganizationEmailsPaginatedRequest getOrganizationEmailsPaginated()
        List organization-visible emails Returns paginated emails visible through organization/team access. Supports inbox filtering, unread-only filtering, search, favourites, plus-address filtering, and optional connector sync.
        Returns:
        APIgetOrganizationEmailsPaginatedRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getRawEmailContents

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetRawEmailContentsRequest getRawEmailContents(@Nonnull
                                                                            UUID emailId)
        Get raw email string. Returns unparsed raw SMTP message with headers and body. Returns the original unparsed SMTP/MIME message as `text/plain`. Use JSON variant if your client expects JSON transport.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetRawEmailContentsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getRawEmailJson

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetRawEmailJsonRequest getRawEmailJson(@Nonnull
                                                                    UUID emailId)
        Get raw email in JSON. Unparsed SMTP message in JSON wrapper format. Returns the original unparsed SMTP/MIME message wrapped in a JSON DTO for API clients that avoid plain-text stream responses.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        Returns:
        APIgetRawEmailJsonRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • getUnreadEmailCount

        public EmailControllerApi.APIgetUnreadEmailCountRequest getUnreadEmailCount()
        Get unread email count Returns unread email count. An email is considered read after dashboard/API retrieval depending on your read workflow.
        Returns:
        APIgetUnreadEmailCountRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • markAllAsRead

        public EmailControllerApi.APImarkAllAsReadRequest markAllAsRead()
        Mark all emails as read or unread Sets read state for all emails, optionally scoped to one inbox. Use `read=false` to reset unread state in bulk.
        Returns:
        APImarkAllAsReadRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        204 No Content -

      • markAsRead

        public EmailControllerApi.APImarkAsReadRequest markAsRead(@Nonnull
                                                          UUID emailId)
        Mark an email as read or unread Sets read state for one email. Useful when implementing custom mailbox workflows that treat viewed messages as unread.
        Parameters:
        emailId - (required)
        Returns:
        APImarkAsReadRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • replyToEmail

        public EmailControllerApi.APIreplyToEmailRequest replyToEmail(@Nonnull
                                                              UUID emailId,
                                                              @Nonnull
                                                              ReplyToEmailOptions replyToEmailOptions)
        Reply to an email Sends a reply using the original conversation context (subject/thread headers). Reply target resolution honors sender/reply-to semantics.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of the email that should be replied to (required)
        replyToEmailOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIreplyToEmailRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • searchEmails

        public EmailControllerApi.APIsearchEmailsRequest searchEmails(@Nonnull
                                                              SearchEmailsOptions searchEmailsOptions)
        Get all emails by search criteria. Return in paginated form. Searches emails by sender/recipient/address/subject/id fields and returns paginated matches. Does not perform full-text body search.
        Parameters:
        searchEmailsOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIsearchEmailsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • sendEmailSourceOptional

        public EmailControllerApi.APIsendEmailSourceOptionalRequest sendEmailSourceOptional(@Nonnull
                                                                                    SendEmailOptions sendEmailOptions)
        Send email Sends an email from an existing inbox, or creates a temporary inbox when `inboxId` is not provided. Supports `useDomainPool` and `virtualSend` inbox creation behavior for convenience sends.
        Parameters:
        sendEmailOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIsendEmailSourceOptionalRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        201 Created -

      • setEmailFavourited

        public EmailControllerApi.APIsetEmailFavouritedRequest setEmailFavourited(@Nonnull
                                                                          UUID emailId,
                                                                          @Nonnull
                                                                          Boolean favourited)
        Set email favourited state Sets favourite state for an email for dashboard/search workflows.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email to set favourite state (required)
        favourited - (required)
        Returns:
        APIsetEmailFavouritedRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        204 No Content -

      • validateEmail

        public EmailControllerApi.APIvalidateEmailRequest validateEmail(@Nonnull
                                                                UUID emailId)
        Validate email HTML contents Runs HTML validation on the email body when HTML is present. Non-HTML emails are treated as valid for this check.
        Parameters:
        emailId - ID of email (required)
        Returns:
        APIvalidateEmailRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        201 Created -
